AI Chatbots

How It Works

From problem to working system fast.

Most clients have a working prototype in their hands within 48 hours of first contact.

01
Get In Touch
Send us an email with a brief overview of your business and the challenges you want to solve. We'll take it from there.
02
We Build It
A custom solution built around your exact workflow. Not a template, not a generic tool. Delivered within 48 hours.
03
You Review It
Test it, give feedback, and we refine until it's exactly right. No technical knowledge required on your end.
04
It Runs For You
Deployed and live. Your team trained in under an hour. Ongoing support and improvements included.

Who We Help

Is Syntrex right for you?

If any of these sound familiar, we can build something that fixes it.

→
You're losing leads

Prospects reach out, don't hear back fast enough, and go elsewhere. An AI system that responds instantly and follows up automatically fixes this overnight.

→
Your team does the same things manually every day

Follow ups, invoices, data entry, reports if your team is doing it manually every single day, we can automate it and give them their time back.

→
You're scaling but your systems aren't

Business is growing but your internal processes are breaking under the weight. We build systems that scale with you so growth doesn't create chaos.

→
Proposals and quotes take too long

If building a proposal takes 30 minutes or more, we can build a tool that does it in under a minute using your own data and brand voice.

→
Your tools don't talk to each other

Email, calendar, forms, and internal systems all separate. We connect them so data flows automatically and nothing gets missed or entered twice.

→
You want AI but don't know where to start

You know AI could help your business but have no idea what to build or where to begin. That's exactly what our free discovery session is for.

About Syntrex

Built on real experience. Delivering real results.

Syntrex was built on real operational experience, not theory. We've worked hands on with growing companies across CPG, industrial B2B, and more, building sales automation, custom AI tools, and internal systems from scratch.

We understand what businesses actually need on the ground. We've seen firsthand how much time and money gets lost to manual work and how quickly the right system fixes it.

We build it. We hand it over. It works.

Services

Everything we build,
built for you.

We don't sell subscriptions or templates. We build custom AI systems that fit exactly how your business operates, handed over ready to run from day one.

01

AI Chatbots

A custom chatbot that qualifies leads, answers common questions, and books appointments around the clock. Your prospects get an instant response at 2am. You wake up to a full calendar.

  • Lead qualification and routing
  • Appointment booking integration
  • FAQ and support automation
  • Works on any website platform
02

Workflow Automation

We map your most time consuming manual tasks and build automation that handles them end to end so your team can focus on work that actually requires a human.

  • Follow up email sequences
  • Invoice and proposal generation
  • Data entry elimination
  • Automated lead routing and follow ups
03

Custom AI Tools

Internal tools your team actually uses, built specifically around how your business works. Generate proposals, quotes, intake forms, or reports in seconds instead of 30 minutes.

  • Proposal and quote generators
  • Client intake automation
  • Custom report builders
  • Any workflow tool you need
04

Lead Generation Systems

AI powered pipelines that capture, score, and follow up with leads automatically. Your sales team only spends time talking to people who are ready to buy.

  • Lead capture and scoring
  • Automated follow up sequences
  • Pipeline reporting dashboards
  • Full system integration
05

AI Content Systems

Automated pipelines that draft emails, posts, proposals, and reports in your brand voice consistently and at scale. You review, you send. That's it.

  • Email drafting automation
  • Social content pipelines
  • Brand voice AI configuration
  • Batch content generation
06

System Integration

We connect your existing tools so they communicate automatically. Calendar, email, forms, databases, and internal systems all stay aligned. No more copy pasting between platforms.

  • Calendar and system sync
  • Form to database automation
  • Multi platform data routing
  • Custom API connections
07

AI Strategy & Consulting

We audit your entire operation, identify the highest value automation opportunities, and build you a clear implementation roadmap. Know exactly where AI fits and what to build first.

  • Full business operations audit
  • Automation opportunity mapping
  • Priority roadmap and action plan
  • Ongoing strategic guidance
08

Growth System Design

End to end growth systems powered by AI covering lead capture, nurturing, conversion, and retention. Designed around your business model and built to scale as you grow.

  • Full funnel design and build
  • Lead nurture automation
  • Conversion optimization tools
  • Retention and reactivation systems
09

AI Business Planning

Custom AI tools that generate business plans, financial projections, competitive analyses, and strategic documents automatically using your real business data. Professional outputs in minutes.

  • Business plan generators
  • Financial projection tools
  • Market analysis automation
  • Strategic document builders
10

Automated Proposal Systems

Stop writing proposals manually. We build custom generators that produce professional branded proposals in under a minute. Enter the job details and a complete document comes out ready to send.

  • Branded proposal templates
  • Auto-populated from job data
  • Delivered in seconds not hours
  • Works for any industry
11

Client Onboarding Automation

Automate your entire client onboarding process from signed contract to first deliverable. Welcome emails, intake forms, document collection, and kickoff scheduling all handled automatically.

  • Automated welcome sequences
  • Digital intake and document collection
  • Calendar and kickoff scheduling
  • Progress tracking and notifications
12

Reporting & Analytics Systems

Custom AI dashboards and automated reporting tools that pull data from across your business and surface the insights that actually matter. No more manual spreadsheet building.

  • Automated weekly and monthly reports
  • Custom KPI dashboards
  • Multi source data aggregation
  • Scheduled delivery to your inbox
13

Website Design & Development

Custom professional websites built from scratch. Fast, mobile ready, and designed to convert visitors into clients. No templates, no page builders. Built specifically for your brand and business goals.

  • Full custom design and development
  • Mobile responsive and fast loading
  • SEO optimized from day one
  • Delivered in days not months
14

AI Content & Social Media

Blog posts, social captions, email newsletters, ad copy, and scheduled posts across every platform — all generated in your brand voice using AI and delivered consistently. Professional content at a fraction of the agency cost.

  • Blog posts and long form articles
  • Social media captions and scheduled posts
  • Email newsletters and sequences
  • Ad copy and landing page content
15

Brand & Digital Presence

Full digital presence buildout for new and growing businesses. Website, social profiles, email setup, content strategy, and AI systems all built and launched together as one complete package.

  • Complete website build
  • Social profile setup and branding
  • Professional email configuration
  • AI content and automation included

About

Built lean.
Built to deliver.

Syntrex isn't a bloated agency with a 6 month timeline. We're a specialized AI automation studio that moves fast and builds things that work from day one.

Our Story

Real experience.
Real results.

Syntrex was built on real operational experience. We've worked hands on with growing companies from consumer brands scaling into major retail to industrial B2B operations, building sales automation tools and custom internal workflows from the ground up.

That experience means we understand what businesses actually need in practice, not just what sounds good in a pitch deck. We've seen firsthand how much time and money gets lost to repetitive manual work and how quickly the right AI system eliminates it.

Now we bring that same work to any business ready to operate smarter, regardless of size, industry, or location.

Work With Us

Pricing

Priced for your needs.

Every business is different. Every project gets a custom quote. No surprises, no hidden fees.

How We Price

We price based on what you actually need.

No fixed tiers. No packages that almost fit. Tell us what you need and we will quote you exactly what it costs to build it right. Projects typically range from a couple hundred dollars to several thousand depending on scope. Monthly retainers are also available for ongoing work.

One-Time Build
Custom
Flat fee per project
A single project built to your exact specifications
Delivered within 48 hours for most builds
Revisions included until it is exactly right
Team training and handover included
Typically ranges from a few hundred to several thousand dollars
Get a Quote
Monthly Retainer
Custom
Per month
Ongoing builds, improvements, and support
Priority turnaround on every request
Monthly strategy and growth sessions
Dedicated point of contact for your account
Scales with your business as you grow
Get a Quote

Every quote is free. Every price is agreed before work begins. No surprises. Contact us to get started.

What Affects Price

What goes into your quote.

Scope & Complexity

A single automation tool is priced differently than a full system build with multiple integrations. We scope every project individually.

Timeline

Standard delivery is within 48 hours. Rush projects or complex timelines may affect pricing. We always confirm before starting.

Integrations

Connecting multiple platforms, APIs, or custom data sources adds to complexity. We factor this in so the quote is always accurate.

Ready for a quote?

Tell us what you need and we will send you a clear price within 24 hours.

Get In Touch
Legal

Legal Documents

Syntrex LLC operates with full legal protection for both our clients and our business. All projects are governed by the following agreements.

Client Agreements

Three agreements protect every project.

Every engagement starts with an NDA, followed by an MSA and a project-specific SOW. All three are required before any work begins.

MSA
Master Service Agreement

The foundational agreement governing all engagements. Covers payment terms, IP ownership, liability limits, AI disclaimers, data handling, confidentiality, non-solicitation, and dispute resolution.

Covers:
50% deposit, 50% on delivery
1.5%/month late fees
IP ownership upon full payment
Liability capped at fees paid
AI output disclaimers
Florida governing law
Download MSA
SOW
Statement of Work

A project-specific document outlining exactly what will be built, the timeline, deliverables, and agreed price. A new SOW is executed for every project.

Covers:
Exact scope and deliverables
Project timeline and milestones
Total project fee
Inclusions and exclusions
Revision and change order policy
Acceptance criteria
Download SOW
NDA
Non-Disclosure Agreement

Mutual confidentiality agreement protecting business information shared by both parties. Signed before any discussions begin.

Covers:
Definition of confidential information
Mutual confidentiality obligations
2-year post-termination protection
Trade secret protection
Exclusions and exceptions
Remedies for breach
Download NDA
Site Policies

How we handle your data and use of our site.

These documents govern your use of syntrexio.com and how we collect and handle information.

Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy

Explains how Syntrex LLC collects, uses, and protects personal information from website visitors, chatbot users, newsletter subscribers, and clients. Effective April 9, 2026.

Covers:
What information we collect
How we use your information
Chatbot data and Anthropic processing
Your rights (CCPA, GDPR)
Data retention and security
How to request deletion
Download Privacy Policy
Terms of Use
Terms of Use

Governs your use of syntrexio.com and the AI chatbot. Limits Syntrex liability for site use to $100, prohibits misuse of the chatbot, and sets dispute resolution terms. Effective April 9, 2026.

Covers:
Chatbot disclaimers and limitations
Permitted and prohibited use
IP ownership of site content
Liability capped at $100 for site use
No class action clause
Florida governing law
Download Terms of Use
